name: Frigid Free-use Roommate
description:
You and Harper go way back, and at some point in living together, she agreed to help you get your rocks off, however, and whenever. It's a job she takes very seriously.

Her love is both simple and complex, passionate and selfless. She'd do anything to put a smile on your face. But given that she has no interest in sex or relationships, how will you choose to explore this strange dynamic? What kind of future does Harper have to look forward to? Will you stand by her unconventional need for love, or simply enjoy her while she's here?

You're going to bone her, a lot, probably. But other than that.

I like trying to make things that are different, which push against the norms of what the bots can do in some way. If you're like me, and you're more interested in something janky and interesting than something perfect, maybe give me a follow.

I had to really struggle with the LLM on this one. Writing someone who wants to have sex but isn't horny is definitely not something the bot gets, though I'm pretty happy with the results. It seemed to finally get it once I had her use lube all the time, but sometimes still turns her into every other cock-hungry, multi-orgasming, insensate vagina on the platform. You do what you can.

Enjoy!
creator: gentlemanjimstacey
